title: isri-aist/RoboManipBaselines
abstract:
A software framework integrating various imitation learning methods and benchmark environments for robotic manipulation

--- # 🤖 [RoboManipBaselines](https://isri-aist.github.io/RoboManipBaselines-ProjectPage) Project Page | arXiv A software framework integrating various **imitation learning methods** and **benchmark environments** for robotic manipulation. Provides easy-to-use **baselines** for policy training, evaluation, and deployment. https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1ad3dcbe-bb4c-4711-96c3-5e196e9d067b --- ## 🚀 Quick Start Start collecting data in the **MuJoCo** simulation, train your model, and rollout the ACT policy in just a few steps! 📄 See the [Quick Start Guide](./doc/quick_start.md). --- ## ⚙️ Installation Follow our step-by-step [Installation Guide](./doc/install.md) to get set up smoothly. --- ## 🧠 Policies We provide several powerful policy architectures for manipulation tasks: - 🔹 **[MLP](./robo_manip_baselines/policy/mlp)**: Simple feedforward policy - 🔹 **[SARNN](./robo_manip_baselines/policy/sarnn)**: Recurrent policy for sequential data - 🔹 **[ACT](./robo_manip_baselines/policy/act)**: Transformer-based action chunking policy - 🔹 **[MT-ACT](./robo_manip_baselines/policy/mt_act)**: Multi-task Transformer-based imitation policy - 🔹 **[Diffusion Policy](./robo_manip_baselines/policy/diffusion_policy)**: Diffusion-based imitation policy - 🔹 **[3D Diffusion Policy](./robo_manip_baselines/policy/diffusion_policy_3d)**: Diffusion-based policy with 3D point cloud input - 🔹 **[Flow Policy](./robo_manip_baselines/policy/flow_policy)**: Flow-matching-based policy with 3D point cloud input - 🔹 **[ManiFlow Policy](./robo_manip_baselines/policy/mani_flow_policy)**: Flow-matching and consistency-based policy with 2D/3D vision - 🔹 **[pi0](./robo_manip_baselines/policy/pi0)**: Flow-matching-based policy with a vision-language model backbone (PaliGemma) - 🔹 **[GR00T](./robo_manip_baselines/policy/gr00t)**: Diffusion Transformer-based policy with a vision-language model backbone (Eagle-2) --- ## 📦 Data - 📂 [Dataset List](./doc/dataset_list.md): Pre-collected expert demonst
abstract_zh: 一个集成了多种模仿学习方法和机器人操作基准环境的软件框架。提供易于使用的基线，用于策略训练、评估和部署。
tldr_zh: 集成多种模仿学习方法的机器人操作基准框架。
cover_zh: 机器人操作太难？这个框架集成了10种模仿学习策略，开箱即用！

judge.reason: 集成多种主流模仿学习算法（ACT、Diffusion Policy、pi0、GR00T等），提供统一基准和仿真环境，对操作VLA研究有高参考价值。

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：一个集成多种模仿学习策略（如ACT、Diffusion Policy、Flow Policy等）和基准环境的软件框架，支持训练、评估和部署。


# 一、动机

> 为机器人操作领域的模仿学习提供一个集成了多种策略和基准环境的统一软件框架，解决现有基线分散、复现困难的问题。


# 二、方法

> 一个集成多种模仿学习策略（如ACT、Diffusion Policy、Flow Policy等）和基准环境的软件框架，支持训练、评估和部署。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 框架包含10种策略架构（如ACT、Diffusion Policy、pi0等）并提供了预收集的数据集，但未报告具体性能数值。


# 四、对我的启发

> 与课题相关，为机器人操作提供了统一的基线实现，但缺乏不同方法的定量比较结果。
